description: Schema for IntelliTester test definition files

platform.description: The platform to run the test on

variables.description: Variables that can be referenced in test steps using ${VARIABLE_NAME} syntax

config.description: Test-specific configuration that overrides global settings

defaults.description: Default settings that apply to all tests unless overridden

timeout.description: Default timeout in milliseconds for all actions

screenshots.description: When to capture screenshots during test execution

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the web application

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for web actions

storageState.description: Playwright storageState: file path (string) or inline {cookies, origins} object. Maps to browser.newContext({ storageState }).

device.description: Device name or ID to run tests on

simulator.description: Simulator name to run tests on

apiKey.description: Appwrite API key with appropriate permissions

cleanup.description: Enable automatic cleanup of created resources

cleanupOnFailure.description: Clean up resources even when test fails

enabled.description: Enable AI-assisted test healing on failures

maxAttempts.description: Maximum AI healing attempts per failure (default: 3)

ai.description: AI configuration for test generation and healing

provider.description: AI provider to use for test generation

model.description: Model name to use (defaults based on provider if omitted)

apiKey.description: API key for the AI provider (supports ${ENV_VAR} syntax)

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the AI API (required for Ollama, auto-set for groq/openrouter)

temperature.description: Temperature for AI generation (0 = deterministic, 2 = very creative)

providerOptions.description: Extra provider-specific options passed verbatim to the Blazen factory (e.g., azure resourceName/deploymentName, bedrock region, fal endpoint, ollama host/port, openaiCompat providerName/defaultModel). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution in string values.

source.description: Source code directories for AI to analyze when generating tests

extensions.description: File extensions to include in source code analysis

steps.description: The sequence of actions to execute in this test

oneOf.description: Navigate to a URL

value.description: URL or path to navigate to

oneOf.description: Click or tap on an element

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Input text into a field (clears field first)

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

value.description: Text to input (can reference variables with ${VAR_NAME})

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Type text character-by-character without clearing (for Stripe, special inputs)

target.description: Element to type into (if omitted, types into the currently focused element)

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

value.description: Text to type character-by-character (appends to existing content)

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Clear the contents of an input field

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Upload one or more files to a file input or filechooser-triggering button

target.description: The <input type="file"> element. Works even when CSS-hidden. Use this OR `trigger`, not both.

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

trigger.description: A button that opens the OS file chooser when clicked. Use this OR `target`, not both.

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

files.description: One file or an ordered list of files. Strings are local paths or http(s) URLs; objects are inline synthetic files.

anyOf.description: File path (relative to test YAML, absolute, or http(s):// URL). Supports {{var}} interpolation.

mimeType.description: MIME type. If omitted, derived from `name` extension; falls back to application/octet-stream.

content.description: Plain-text file contents. Mutually exclusive with `base64`.

base64.description: Base64-encoded file contents. Mutually exclusive with `content`.

anyOf.description: File path (relative to test YAML, absolute, or http(s):// URL). Supports {{var}} interpolation.

mimeType.description: MIME type. If omitted, derived from `name` extension; falls back to application/octet-stream.

content.description: Plain-text file contents. Mutually exclusive with `base64`.

base64.description: Base64-encoded file contents. Mutually exclusive with `content`.

frame.description: Iframe context for the target/trigger element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Hover over an element

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Select an option from a dropdown

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

value.description: Option value, label, or index to select

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Check a checkbox

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Uncheck a checkbox

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Press a keyboard key

key.description: Key to press (e.g., Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowDown)

target.description: Element to focus before pressing key

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element or keyboard action

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Focus an element

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Assert that an element exists or contains expected text

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

value.description: Expected text content

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

timeout.description: Time to wait in milliseconds

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Scroll the page or an element

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

oneOf.description: Take a screenshot

waitBefore.description: Milliseconds to wait before capturing for visual stability (default: 500)

path.description: File path (relative to cwd) to write Playwright storageState JSON. Calls page.context().storageState({ path }).

handler.description: Path (relative to cwd) to a TS/JS file exporting `default async ({ page, context, variables }) => void`. Called instead of the built-in writer for custom serialization (e.g., to Python pickle, SQLite, S3, ...).

has.description: Cookie names that MUST be present in the context.

not.description: Cookie names that MUST NOT be present in the context.

match.description: Map of cookie name to value-matching pattern (substring by default; wrap in /.../ for regex).

url.description: Optional URL/origin filter passed to context.cookies(url).

oneOf.description: Assert that a network response matching the given URL/status/headers was seen since `since`.

url.description: URL pattern: glob by default (** = any path, * = single segment), or /regex/ for regex.

headers.description: Headers that must all match. Header name is case-insensitive. Values: substring match by default, or /regex/ for regex.

since.description: Time window lower bound. Default: previousStep.

timeout.description: Max wait in ms for a matching response (default 5000).

oneOf.description: Set a variable for use in later steps

value.description: Static value to set

path.description: JSON path or selector for extraction

oneOf.description: Wait for an email to arrive

mailbox.description: Email address or mailbox to check

timeout.description: How long to wait for email in milliseconds

oneOf.description: Extract a verification code from email

saveTo.description: Variable name to save the extracted code

oneOf.description: Extract a link from email

saveTo.description: Variable name to save the extracted link

pattern.description: Regular expression to match specific links

oneOf.description: Clear emails from a mailbox

mailbox.description: Email address or mailbox to clear

oneOf.description: Verify email using Appwrite
Pause execution and open Playwright Inspector for debugging
Wait for an element to reach a specific state

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

timeout.description: Time to wait in milliseconds

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

errorIf.description: Fail immediately if this condition is met (no waiting)

eval.description: JavaScript expression to evaluate in page context

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

frame.description: Iframe context for the target element

css.description: CSS selector for the iframe element

name.description: Name or id attribute of the iframe

index.description: Zero-based index when multiple iframes match (default: 0)

format.description: Output format for element content (default: text)

oneOf.description: Explicitly fail the test with a custom message

message.description: Error message to display when test fails

oneOf.description: Evaluate page state via screenshot analysis (OCR and/or AI vision)

expected.description: Text to find in screenshot (substring or regex)

mode.description: ocr=OCR only, ai=LLM vision only, auto=OCR first then AI fallback (default: auto)

regex.description: Treat expected as regex patterns (default: false)

waitBefore.description: ms to wait before screenshot for visual stability (default: 500)

fullPage.description: Full page or viewport only (default: true)

confidence.description: Min OCR confidence threshold, below falls back to AI in auto mode (default: 60)

type.description: Tracked resource type (e.g., row, user, file)

includeStepContext.description: Include step context with tracked resource

allOf.description: Execute steps conditionally based on element state

description.description: AI-friendly description of the element to find

then.description: Steps to execute if condition is true

not.description: Cookie names that MUST NOT be present in the context.
